title: senecio urundensis var. urundensis
intro: Senecio urundensis var. urundensis is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Madagascar. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio urundensis var. urundensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
